title: Sales Channels - Setting up the imprint for web shops and QR sales channels
workflow_title: Setting up the imprint for web shops and QR sales channels

steps.caption: Welcome. This guide shows how to set up the imprint for web shops and QR sales channels.
In the Backoffice, go to Self-service and click Sales channels.
Click the pencil icon of your desired QR sales channel.
Scroll to the Imprint field and insert your imprint text.
Open the General menu (General → General) and click Send to transmit your changes.
